overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a foggy, rain-soaked coastal village. The character descends from a mountain path into a waterfront settlement with stone houses and wooden docks, passing various NPCs along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain trail through coniferous forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow mountain path surrounded by dense forest and rocky cliffs

entered.detail: steep rocky mountain face forming the left valley wall
steep rocky mountain face forming the right valley wall
dense pine and fir trees lining the mountain path
rocky island with ancient stone ruins visible through the mist across the water
narrow dirt and grass path winding through the mountain valley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy mountain trail enclosed by steep rocky cliffs and dense coniferous forest. The character walks steadily along the dirt path toward a distant castle island visible through the mist, with rain falling steadily in the dim dusk light.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal village waterfront with stone cottages

events.description: exits narrow mountain trail into open waterfront village area with stone buildings
sun briefly breaks through fog creating a bright glare on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront gravel path, passing a villager in red clothing

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing walking along the waterfront path

entered.detail: small stone and timber cottage with thatched roof
wooden pilings and dock structures along the waterline
large wooden sailing vessel moored near the shore

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the mountain trail onto a gravel waterfront path lined with stone cottages. A sailing ship is moored on the left while the castle island remains visible across the water. The character passes a villager in red clothing as the sun momentarily breaks through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock along the waterfront

events.description: steps from gravel path onto wooden dock planks extending over the water

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the wooden dock planks, passing fishing equipment and boats

notable_agents.action: villager standing near fishing barrels on the dock

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock walkway extending over the water
small wooden fishing vessel tied to the dock
low stone wall supporting the village above the dock level
wooden barrels and fishing gear stacked along the dock

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto weathered wooden dock planks extending over the water, walking past fishing boats and equipment. A stone retaining wall rises on the right while the water stretches out to the left. A villager stands near fishing barrels as the character proceeds along the pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with grass paths and scattered cottages

events.description: leaves wooden dock and steps onto grassy village path inland

agents.ego_description: walking through the village outskirts, passing groups of villagers and children near stone cottages

notable_agents.action: group of villagers including children walking along the path

entered.detail: muddy grass and dirt path winding through the village outskirts
rough wooden picket fences enclosing cottage yards
small stone building with wooden door, possibly a shrine or storage shed

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dock behind, the character walks onto grassy village paths surrounded by wooden fences and stone cottages. Groups of villagers including children move about the area as the path leads away from the water toward the forested outskirts of the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, rainy mountain pass down into a bustling coastal village. It begins on a foggy dirt trail enclosed by steep rocky cliffs and dense coniferous forest, moving steadily toward a distant castle island visible through the mist. As the character emerges from the trail, the scene shifts to a gravel waterfront path lined with stone cottages and a moored sailing ship, while the dim dusk light momentarily brightens as the sun breaks through the fog. The camera then follows the character onto weathered wooden dock planks, passing fishing boats and barrels before turning away from the water. Finally, the environment opens into grassy village paths surrounded by wooden fences and stone cottages, moving past groups of villagers and children toward the forested outskirts of the settlement.
